- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. - Done.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - Requirements provided by user.

- [x] Scaffold the Project - Client and server scaffolds created.

- [x] Customize the Project - Core modules, UI, and API layers added.

- [x] Install Required Extensions - No extensions needed.

- [x] Compile the Project - Client build completed.

- [x] Create and Run Task - Created dev tasks for server and client.

- [x] Launch the Project - Client and server dev tasks running.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - README and instructions updated.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
